name: Lucas | LOOMIAN LEGACY
description:
our (YES, OUR!!!) favorite food lover blond boi!!!! its a crime there aint no other bots of him. uhh, free scenario!!! for what my last braincells standing understand i cant publish minor characcter (and screw everynyan that made janitor add that rule) soo lets just say our best boi is 19, since he doesn't have a canon age. uhh, u can still change this in your initial message tho! that'd be abt it, have funs!

smol note: its recommendable to settle the scenario after the battle at Sheparite city!
creator: Local Bi-Demiaro pal
